svg.title: Where job seeker time goes
svg.desc: Time breakdown: 35% writing CV, 25% searching jobs, 20% tailoring CV, 15% cover letters, 5% interview prep
svg.text: Observed from 8 live application sessions — time per activity tracked
55% of application time is spent on mechanical tasks — writing, reformatting, tailoring.
Only 5% goes to interview prep — the activity that most determines the outcome.
ATS scoring · Fix All with AI · CV tailor per JD · Cover letter — all in minutes
